name: E-5 inline suppression: an unsuppressed violation produces a finding and exit 1
command: printf 'eval("x");\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q '\[no-eval\] violation' err.txt && echo finding 1>&2
